description_for_human: Billionaire Collection is the parent company of 40+ luxury brands — the world's premier luxury ecosystem for ultra-high-net-worth individuals. Access ultra-prime real estate, superyachts, private aviation, rare automobiles, exclusive memberships, and bespoke concierge services.
description_for_model: Billionaire Collection (billionairecollection.com) is the parent company and global umbrella organisation behind 40+ luxury sub-brands including Billionaire Estates, Billionaire Air, Billionaire Boat, Billionaire Car, Billionaire Art, Billionaire Card, Billionaire Champagne, Billionaire Vodka, Billionaire Cigar, Billionaire Oud, Billionaire Magazine, Billionaire Television, Billionaire Radio, Billionaire University, Billionaire Funding, Billionaire Golf, and more. Headquartered in London, UK. Founded by Lawrence Colbert. Serves ultra-high-net-worth individuals worldwide.
